mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_cart_item (user_id, product_id, sku_id, quantity, is_checked) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{skuId}, #{quantity}, COALESCE(#{isChecked}, 1))
mapper.update: UPDATE t_cart_item SET quantity = #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_cart_item SET is_checked = #{isChecked} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_cart_item SET is_checked = #{isChecked} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_cart_item WHERE user_id = #{userId}
